17. ~make_wedding_plans(X0) | engaged(X0) [cnf transformation 11]
18. ~invite_others(X0) | make_wedding_plans(X0) [cnf transformation 12]
19. invite_others(X0) | ~well_attended_wedding(X0) [cnf transformation 13]
24. ~invite_others(john) | ~engaged(john) [cnf transformation 14]
25. well_attended_wedding(john) | invite_others(john) | ~larger_family(john) [cnf transformation 16]
26. larger_family(john) [cnf transformation 10]
27. well_attended_wedding(john) | invite_others(john) [forward subsumption resolution 25,26]

31. ~engaged(john) <- (~1) [avatar component clause 29]
33. 2 <=> make_wedding_plans(john) [avatar definition]
35. make_wedding_plans(john) <- (2) [avatar component clause 33]
38. 3 <=> invite_others(john) [avatar definition]
39. invite_others(john) <- (3) [avatar component clause 38]
41. ~1 | ~3 [avatar split clause 24,38,29]
42. invite_others(john) [forward subsumption resolution 27,19]
43. 3 [avatar split clause 42,38]
44. make_wedding_plans(john) <- (3) [resolution 18,39]
45. 2 | ~3 [avatar split clause 44,38,33]
46. engaged(john) <- (2) [resolution 35,17]
47. $false <- (~1, 2) [forward subsumption resolution 46,31]
48. 1 | ~2 [avatar contradiction clause 47]

s3. 3 [sat_conversion 43]
s4. ~3 | 2 [sat_conversion 45]
s5. ~2 | 1 [sat_conversion 48]
s6. 2 [rat s4,s3]
s7. 1 [rat s5,s6]
s8. # [rat s2,s7,s3]
49. $false [avatar sat refutation s8]
